Crawl Results

  • Sources checked: Hetzner, RunPod, RackNerd, DigitalOcean
  • Deals updated: 45 deals written to data/deals.json
  • Errors: None — all 4 providers returned successfully

Data Validation

  • Deal count: 45 (threshold: 30) ✅
  • Bundle count: 8 (threshold: 5) ✅
  • Bad entries: None — all deals have pricing data
  • Note: 16 deals use annual/usage pricing (domains, storage, AI APIs, free tiers) instead of monthly — this is expected and valid

Build Status

  • gatsby clean ✅
  • gatsby build --prefix-paths ✅ — 58 pages generated
  • rewrite-paths.sh ✅ — 60 HTML files fixed, __PATH_PREFIX__ injected, webpack publicPath set to /deals/

Deploy Status

  • container-build.sh completed ✅
  • Main site: 588 pages built
  • Deals site: 58 pages built
  • Deployed to GitHub Pages: b126e0e ✅
  • Main site root index.html preserved (Bobbie Intelligence) ✅

Live Verification

Check Result
https://solo.engineer/ ✅ Bobbie Intelligence present
https://solo.engineer/deals/ ✅ 200 OK
page-data/deals/page-data.json ✅ 200 OK
Asset paths (/deals/ prefix) ✅ Rewritten correctly

Issues

None. Clean build and deploy.
